context: Agent was asked to start Wave 2 while Wave 1 has an unconfirmed verification check. Evaluate whether the agent correctly blocks advancement and keeps the document unchanged.

checklist.name: blocks-wave-2-advancement
checklist.description: Agent explicitly refuses to mark Wave 2 as in-progress or start any Wave 2 task, citing the incomplete Wave 1 verification gate

checklist.name: identifies-specific-failing-check
checklist.description: Agent names the specific verification check that has not passed (the e2e smoke test: `bun run test:e2e pipeline`), not just 'a check is missing'

checklist.name: wave-2-document-unchanged
checklist.description: The wave document is not modified: Wave 2 remains PENDING and no task under Wave 2 is marked in-progress

checklist.name: explains-gate-rule
checklist.description: Agent articulates the gate rule: Wave N+1 cannot start until ALL Wave N verification checks are confirmed, regardless of flakiness concerns

checklist.name: provides-path-to-unblock
checklist.description: Agent tells the user what they need to do next: confirm the e2e test passes (or tick it off if they accept the risk) before Wave 2 can begin
